subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified from all utterances, beseemeth and is worthy of the Lord of the Day of Resurrection, Who through His Most Great Name hath guided the world and its peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از الفاظ مالک یوم معاد را لایق و سزاست که باسم اعظم عالم و اممرا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
